---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for mcp-nbb
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's blocking you? Link to an NBB dataflow
(see `nbb://catalog`) if relevant.

## Proposed solution

What change in mcp-nbb would unblock this? Ideally a concrete tool signature
or a small example prompt the LLM would use.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to achieve the same result.

## Additional context

Screenshots, SDMX spec references, prior art in other SDMX clients, etc.
